name: alchemy
description: Installable Alchemy developer platform skills for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Tools for crypto app development, data, and infrastructure
interface.longDescription: Bundles Alchemy's public skills for routing between API key and gateway auth, building with JSON-RPC and Data APIs, and integrating deeper Alchemy platform features.
defaultPrompt: Build a crypto prices dashboard in React
Sign up and prepay for compute autonomously using x402
Build a Solana asset viewer using the DAS API
